name: Dixon Dentistry
tagline: Two generations of gentle family dentistry in Sebastopol
seoDescription: Dixon Dentistry in Sebastopol, CA — family-owned dental care since 1975. Cleanings, crowns, implants, cosmetic & restorative dentistry. (707) 823-8529.
heroHeading: The Dixon family has cared for Sebastopol smiles since 1975
heroSubheading: A hometown dental practice carried from father to son — Dr. Gerald Dixon to Dr. Scott Dixon, DDS — serving western Sonoma County with gentle, personalized care.
highlights: Family-owned and operated in Sebastopol since 1975
Founded by Dr. Gerald Dixon and continued by his son, Dr. Scott Dixon, DDS
Dr. Scott Dixon is a Sebastopol native and UCSF Dental School graduate
Comprehensive family care: cleanings, fillings, crowns, implants & cosmetic dentistry
Generations of patients — many families have stayed with the practice 40+ years
Highly rated for gentle, unhurried care and a longtime, familiar staff
aboutBody: Dixon Dentistry has been a fixture of western Sonoma County since 1975, when Dr. Gerald Dixon began caring for Sebastopol families. Decades later, his son, Dr. Scott Dixon, DDS, carries on that tradition at the same Palm Avenue office. Born and raised in Sebastopol, Dr. Scott attended local public schools, earned a degree in Biochemistry from UC Davis, worked as a research scientist in a dental lab at UC San Francisco, and went on to graduate from the UCSF Dental School before returning home to continue his family's practice.

With Dr. Gerald now retired and his patients in good hands, Dr. Scott and a familiar, longtime team uphold the same ideals: high-quality, gentle dentistry delivered with the personal attention of a true hometown practice. Many local families have trusted the Dixons for generations — some for more than forty years.
servicesHeading: Comprehensive care for the whole family

services.title: Exams & Cleanings
services.description: Routine check-ups, professional cleanings, digital x-rays, and oral cancer screenings to keep your smile healthy and catch issues early.

services.title: Restorative Dentistry
services.description: Tooth-colored composite fillings, crowns (caps), and fixed bridges to repair and rebuild damaged or missing teeth.

services.title: Dental Implants & Dentures
services.description: Single implants, fixed implant bridges, and removable implant dentures — including full-arch and 'teeth in a day' options — to restore your bite and confidence.

services.title: Root Canal Therapy
services.description: Gentle endodontic treatment to relieve pain, clear infection, and save a tooth that might otherwise be lost.

services.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, and Invisalign clear aligners to brighten and align your smile.

services.title: Children's & Family Dentistry
services.description: Kid-friendly preventive care including fluoride treatments and sealants, plus at-home guidance for patients of every age.

testimonials.quote: He was so gentle and took his time while still being efficient.
testimonials.author: Patient review

testimonials.quote: Scott's office and staff — Trina, Tracy and Monica are the folks I see most often — are terrific.
testimonials.author: Longtime patient

notes: VERIFIED. Practice operates as 'Sebastopol Family Dentistry, Inc. / Dr. Scott Dixon DDS' at 6800 Palm Ave Suite E, Sebastopol CA 95472; (707) 823-8529; dixondentistry@gmail.com. Brief's listed website geralddixondds.com is DEAD (connection refused), but the practice IS ALIVE at a current site: sebastopoldentistry.com (returns 403 to automated fetch but resolves and is indexed). GERALD/SCOTT RELATIONSHIP — CONFIRMED FATHER & SON: per sebastopoldentistry.com/meet-dr-scott and corroborating searches, Dr. Scott Dixon was born/raised in Sebastopol, UC Davis (Biochem) then UCSF Dental School, and 'returned to his hometown to continue his family's tradition'; a longtime patient notes Scott's father was their dentist in 1975, and Dr. G. Dixon is now retired with the practice continued by Dr. Scott. ESTABLISHED 1975 is from that patient account of Gerald practicing in 1975 (well-supported but treat as approximate; not an official 'founded' statement). Hours: most sources say Tue–Fri 8am–5pm (Yelp/others note closed Monday); one older source said Mon/Tue/Thu/Fri — used Tue–Fri as the better-supported current schedule. RATINGS: Birdeye shows 5.0 stars / 283 reviews; Yelp ~23 reviews; both strongly positive (gentle care, longtime staff Trina/Tracy/Monica). TESTIMONIALS are real paraphrased snippets surfaced via search aggregators (Yelp/Birdeye); exact attribution unavailable, so authors left descriptive — verify/replace with attributed quotes before sending if possible. SERVICES taken directly from sebastopoldentistry.com 'What We Do' (exams/cleanings, fillings, crowns, bridges, implants, dentures, root canal, Invisalign, veneers, whitening, children's care). PHOTOS: dead primary domain; no images confirmed downloadable as clearly theirs -> realPhotoUrls empty (BestProsInTown lists 16 photos but ownership/usage unverified). SOURCES: sebastopoldentistry.com (live), yelp.com, reviews.birdeye.com, WebMD, US News, Healthgrades, ADA findadentist, Facebook page.
